news.t: 5 of the Best Preferred Stock ETFs for High and Stable Dividends

overview.description: The VanEck Preferred Securities ex Financials ETF (PFXF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund tracks an index comprised of USD denominated preferred securities and securities that the index provider deems to be functionally equivalent. Securities issued by financial firms are excluded. PFXF was launched on Jul 16, 2012 and is issued by VanEck.
infoTable: ICE Exchange-Listed Fixed & Adjustable Rate Non-Financial Preferred Securities Index

data.title: 5 of the Best Preferred Stock ETFs for High and Stable Dividends
data.text: The best preferred stock ETFs allow you to reduce your risk by investing in baskets of preferred stocks.
